title: Roasted Padron Peppers with Balsamic Glaze
description: A simple and flavorful side dish, perfect for any occasion. Roasting brings out the natural sweetness in padron peppers.
instructions: Cut padron peppers in half, removing seeds and membranes.
Place peppers on parchment paper, cut side up.
Drizzle olive oil over peppers and sprinkle with salt.
Roast in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until blistered.
Reduce balsamic vinegar in a saucepan over low heat until thickened.
Serve roasted peppers with reduced balsamic glaze.
Optional: garnish with fresh herbs or grated cheese.
